overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a dark forested landscape at night. The scene transitions from rocky mountain trails past ancient stone ruins to dense pine forests, illuminated by bright moonlight and distant settlement lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail under bright moonlight

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the winding path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow dirt path between rocky embankments, carrying swords on his back

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail with visible footprints and grass edges
steep rocky embankment with moss and small shrubs
stone wall and rocky slope lining the path
bright full moon illuminating the scene from behind clouds
tall pine trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow mountain trail at night, with Geralt walking between rocky walls. The bright full moon casts sharp shadows across the path, while distant pine trees line the horizon. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character navigates a slight right turn in the winding path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside with ancient stone ruins

events.description: exiting narrow rocky corridor into open landscape with visible stone ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as it opens into a wider area, passing ancient stone structures

entered.detail: ancient stone ruins and crumbling walls beside the path
rolling grassy hills extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The path widens into an open hillside where ancient stone ruins become visible on the right. The terrain shifts from rocky corridors to grassy slopes, with the moon now positioned to the left. The character walks steadily through this more exposed landscape with distant mountains visible ahead.

events.description: distant settlement lights become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward distant lights, navigating gentle curves in the hillside path

entered.detail: warm yellow lights from a distant village or settlement visible on the horizon
tall stone tower ruins standing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens further to reveal rolling grassy hills with a distant settlement's lights twinkling on the horizon. A prominent stone tower ruin stands on the right as the path curves gently. The vegetation becomes denser with scattered pine trees approaching from the sides.

events.description: entering dense forest with significantly reduced light levels

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the dark forest, surrounded by dense trees on both sides

entered.detail: tall dense pine trees forming a dark wall along the left side of the path
thick forest vegetation and pine trees closing in on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dense pine forest where the path becomes narrow and enclosed. The settlement lights disappear behind as tall trees close in on both sides, creating a dark canopy overhead. The moonlight filters through the branches, casting dappled shadows on the trail as Geralt continues walking deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit mountain landscape that gradually transitions from open rocky trails into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins on a narrow mountain path between rocky walls, following Geralt as he navigates a winding turn under the sharp light of a full moon. As the path widens, the terrain shifts into open grassy slopes where ancient stone ruins appear on the right and distant mountains emerge on the horizon. The scene then expands across rolling hills toward the twinkling lights of a distant settlement, passing a prominent stone tower before the vegetation begins to thicken. Finally, the landscape closes in as the path enters a dense pine forest, where the settlement lights vanish and the moonlight filters through a dark canopy of towering trees.
